allow: PowerShell($env:APPWRITE_ENDPOINT = "https://fra.cloud.appwrite.io/v1"; $env:APPWRITE_PROJECT = "6a159b4d000f669ad1a9"; $env:APPWRITE_KEY = \(Get-Content .env.local | Where-Object { $_ -match '^APPWRITE_API_KEY=' } | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace '^APPWRITE_API_KEY=', '' }\); $headers = @{ "X-Appwrite-Project" = $env:APPWRITE_PROJECT; "X-Appwrite-Key" = $env:APPWRITE_KEY; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; $collections = @\("users", "contracts", "contract_parties", "audio_files", "audit_log"\); foreach \($col in $collections\) { $url = "$\($env:APPWRITE_ENDPOINT\)/databases/naatal/collections/$col/documents"; try { $res = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -Headers $headers -Method Get; Write-Host "$col : $\($res.total\) documents" } catch { Write-Host "$col : error $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($env:APPWRITE_ENDPOINT = "https://fra.cloud.appwrite.io/v1"; $env:APPWRITE_PROJECT = "6a159b4d000f669ad1a9"; $env:APPWRITE_KEY = \(Get-Content .env.local | Where-Object { $_ -match '^APPWRITE_API_KEY=' } | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace '^APPWRITE_API_KEY=', '' }\); $headers = @{ "X-Appwrite-Project" = $env:APPWRITE_PROJECT; "X-Appwrite-Key" = $env:APPWRITE_KEY; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; $collections = @\("audit_log", "audio_files", "contract_parties", "contracts", "users"\); foreach \($col in $collections\) { $url = "$\($env:APPWRITE_ENDPOINT\)/databases/naatal/collections/$col/documents"; $res = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -Headers $headers -Method Get; foreach \($doc in $res.documents\) { $delUrl = "$url/$\($doc.'$id'\)"; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $delUrl -Headers $headers -Method Delete | Out-Null; Write-Host "Deleted $col/$\($doc.'$id'\)" } catch { Write-Host "Failed $col/$\($doc.'$id'\): $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } } })

PowerShell($env:APPWRITE_ENDPOINT = "https://fra.cloud.appwrite.io/v1"; $env:APPWRITE_PROJECT = "6a159b4d000f669ad1a9"; $env:APPWRITE_KEY = \(Get-Content .env.local | Where-Object { $_ -match '^APPWRITE_API_KEY=' } | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace '^APPWRITE_API_KEY=', '' }\); $headers = @{ "X-Appwrite-Project" = $env:APPWRITE_PROJECT; "X-Appwrite-Key" = $env:APPWRITE_KEY; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; $url = "$\($env:APPWRITE_ENDPOINT\)/users"; $res = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -Headers $headers -Method Get; Write-Host "$\($res.total\) auth users:"; foreach \($u in $res.users\) { Write-Host "  $\($u.'$id'\) | $\($u.phone\) | $\($u.name\) | created: $\($u.'$createdAt'\)" })

PowerShell($env:APPWRITE_ENDPOINT = "https://fra.cloud.appwrite.io/v1"; $env:APPWRITE_PROJECT = "6a159b4d000f669ad1a9"; $env:APPWRITE_KEY = \(Get-Content .env.local | Where-Object { $_ -match '^APPWRITE_API_KEY=' } | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace '^APPWRITE_API_KEY=', '' }\); $headers = @{ "X-Appwrite-Project" = $env:APPWRITE_PROJECT; "X-Appwrite-Key" = $env:APPWRITE_KEY; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; $url = "$\($env:APPWRITE_ENDPOINT\)/users"; $res = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -Headers $headers -Method Get; foreach \($u in $res.users\) { $delUrl = "$url/$\($u.'$id'\)"; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $delUrl -Headers $headers -Method Delete | Out-Null; Write-Host "Deleted user $\($u.'$id'\)" } catch { Write-Host "Failed $\($u.'$id'\): $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($env:APPWRITE_ENDPOINT = "https://fra.cloud.appwrite.io/v1"; $env:APPWRITE_PROJECT = "6a159b4d000f669ad1a9"; $env:APPWRITE_KEY = \(Get-Content .env.local | Where-Object { $_ -match '^APPWRITE_API_KEY=' } | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace '^APPWRITE_API_KEY=', '' }\); $headers = @{ "X-Appwrite-Project" = $env:APPWRITE_PROJECT; "X-Appwrite-Key" = $env:APPWRITE_KEY; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; $url = "$\($env:APPWRITE_ENDPOINT\)/storage/buckets/files/files"; $res = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -Headers $headers -Method Get; Write-Host "$\($res.total\) files in Storage"; foreach \($f in $res.files\) { $delUrl = "$url/$\($f.'$id'\)"; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $delUrl -Headers $headers -Method Delete | Out-Null; Write-Host "Deleted file $\($f.'$id'\)" } catch { Write-Host "Failed $\($f.'$id'\)" } })

PowerShell($endpoint = "https://fra.cloud.appwrite.io/v1"; $project = "6a159b4d000f669ad1a9"; $key = \(Get-Content .env.local | Where-Object { $_ -match '^APPWRITE_API_KEY=' } | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace '^APPWRITE_API_KEY=', '' }\); $headers = @{ "X-Appwrite-Project" = $project; "X-Appwrite-Key" = $key; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; $body = @{ key = "recorded_by"; type = "string"; required = $false; size = 255; default = "" } | ConvertTo-Json; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "$endpoint/databases/naatal/collections/audio_files/attributes/string" -Method Post -Headers $headers -Body $body)
